description: The DocumentInterface component is a Favorites Type Component that is used in the default or custom document viewers.

fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned this document viewer.
fields.SpawningUserID: The field that contains the user ID of the user that spawned this document viewer.
fields.IsInstance: Whether this was spawned by the Favorites system (true) or spawned from inventory (false)
fields.URL: The URL field of the document asset component this document viewer is showing.
fields.Page: The field that controls which page this document viewer is currently showing.
